task_completion.description: Access the Northwind Traders business in Manager.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface is open and 'Northwind Traders' is visible as the active business at the top or in the breadcrumbs.
The 'Expense Claims' tab is visible in the left navigation menu, indicating the module has been enabled (likely via the Customize menu).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Expense Claims section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main screen displays the Expense Claims list or the 'New Expense Claim' form.

task_completion.description: Set the payer to Nancy Davolio
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Expense Claim form or the saved record view, 'Nancy Davolio' is selected or entered in the Payer field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the expense
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field contains 'Client Dinner - Global Food Expo' or at least the keywords 'Dinner', 'Expo', and 'Global'.
The Account dropdown for the line item is set to 'Travel', 'Entertainment', 'General Expenses', or a similar appropriate expense account.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct amount and save the claim
task_completion.visual_evidence: The amount field shows 125.50 and the claim is either actively being saved or is shown as a completed record in the Expense Claims list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Manager.io application window being interacted with via mouse/keyboard, not a terminal or script execution.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual accounting software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Manager.io, not a text editor, spreadsheet, or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The expense claim was actually created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved expense claim record or the updated Expense Claims list, rather than just an abandoned, unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task must be performed in Manager.io under the 'Northwind Traders' business. The expense claim must have the payer 'Nancy Davolio', an amount of 125.50, and a description containing the keywords 'Dinner', 'Expo', and 'Global'.
